# Openapi2kotlin 0.16.0 Documentation

> Version-pinned documentation for openapi2kotlin 0.16.0. Use this file when you need links and structured data for this exact release.

Version: 0.16.0
Latest stable version: 0.17.0

## Start Here
- Versioned docs: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.16.0
- Installation: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.16.0#installation
- AI / LLMs: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.16.0#llms
- Under the Hood: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.16.0#under-the-hood
- API Reference: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.16.0#api-reference

## Framework Targets
- Client libraries: Ktor, RestClient
- Server libraries: Ktor, Spring

## How It Works

Generated sources land under the specified `outputDir` and selected `packageName`.

## Configuration Options

### `inputSpec`

- Required: true
- Default: -
- Values: -
- Description:
```kotlin
Path to OpenAPI YAML or JSON specification, e.g. "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml".
```

### `outputDir`

- Required: true
- Default: -
- Values: -
- Description:
```kotlin
Root directory for generated Kotlin sources, e.g. layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path.
```

### `enabled`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Enables or disables code generation for the current Gradle run.

### `model.packageName`

- Required: false
- Default: "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
- Values: -
- Description: Package name for generated model classes.

### `model.serialization`

- Required: false
- Default: Ktor -> KotlinX, Server Spring -> Jackson, Client RestClient -> Jackson
- Values: KotlinX, Jackson
- Description: Serialization annotation family for generated model classes.

### `model.validation`

- Required: false
- Default: None
- Values: None, Jakarta, JavaX
- Description: Validation annotations namespace used in generated models.

### `model.double2BigDecimal`

- Required: false
- Default: false
- Values: true, false
- Description: Maps OpenAPI number/double to BigDecimal instead of Double.

### `model.float2BigDecimal`

- Required: false
- Default: false
- Values: true, false
- Description: Maps OpenAPI number/float to BigDecimal instead of Float.

### `model.integer2Long`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Maps OpenAPI integer to Long instead of Int.

### `client.packageName`

- Required: false
- Default: "dev.openapi2kotlin.client"
- Values: -
- Description: Base package for generated API classes.

### `client.library`

- Required: true
- Default: -
- Values: Ktor, RestClient
- Description: Target HTTP client library used by generated client API.

### `client.basePathVar`

- Required: false
- Default: "basePath"
- Values: -
- Description:
```kotlin
Uses the first OpenAPI server variable matching `basePathVar` when it has a default value, e.g.

servers:
  - url: '/{basePath}'
    variables:
      basePath:
        default: 'v5/'
```

### `client.methodNameSingularized`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Singularizes method names for single-resource endpoints, e.g. `retrieveQuote`.

### `client.methodNamePluralized`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Pluralizes method names for collection endpoints, e.g. `listQuotes`.

### `client.methodNameFromOperationId`

- Required: false
- Default: false
- Values: true, false
- Description: Derives method names from OpenAPI `operationId` instead of URL path.

### `server.packageName`

- Required: false
- Default: "dev.openapi2kotlin.server"
- Values: -
- Description: Base package for generated API classes.

### `server.library`

- Required: true
- Default: -
- Values: Ktor, Spring
- Description: Target server framework used by generated server API.

### `server.swagger`

- Required: false
- Default: Ktor -> false, Spring -> true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Enables generated Swagger/OpenAPI annotations.

### `server.basePathVar`

- Required: false
- Default: "basePath"
- Values: -
- Description:
```kotlin
Uses the first OpenAPI server variable matching `basePathVar` when it has a default value, e.g.

servers:
  - url: '/{basePath}'
    variables:
      basePath:
        default: 'v5/'
```

### `server.methodNameSingularized`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Singularizes method names for single-resource endpoints, e.g. `retrieveQuote`.

### `server.methodNamePluralized`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Pluralizes method names for collection endpoints, e.g. `listQuotes`.

### `server.methodNameFromOperationId`

- Required: false
- Default: false
- Values: true, false
- Description: Derives method names from OpenAPI `operationId` instead of URL path.

## Configuration Snippets

### Client

#### Ktor

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = KotlinX
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    client {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.client"
        library = Ktor
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

#### RestClient

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = Jackson
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    client {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.client"
        library = RestClient
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

### Server

#### Ktor

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = KotlinX
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    server {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.server"
        library = Ktor
        swagger = false
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

#### Spring

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = Jackson
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    server {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.server"
        library = Spring
        swagger = true
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

## External Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/openapi2kotlin/openapi2kotlin
- Maven Central: https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/dev.openapi2kotlin/openapi2kotlin
